description: Premium Page Redesigns - Redesign all main pages (Home/Search, Discover, Artist, Album, Track, Dashboard, Favorites, Playlists) with editorial layouts, large hero sections, cinematic artwork, spacious typography, and smooth visual hierarchy. Plus redesign SearchBar, AudioPlayer, loading/error/empty states, and not-found page.
steps: Redesign app/page.tsx (Home/Search): Create a large cinematic hero section when no query is present - oversized typography, spacious layout, artistic flair. When search results are shown, use generous whitespace and refined result presentation. Make the page feel like a luxury landing page.

Redesign app/components/SearchBar.tsx: Larger, more elegant search input with premium styling - taller input, refined border, smooth focus animation, larger dropdown with better spacing, elegant suggestion items. Keep all existing functionality (voice search, autocomplete, recent searches) but elevate the visual design.

Redesign app/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Premium full-size audio player with glassmorphism, larger controls, custom-styled progress bar (not default range input appearance - use a styled track with a glow effect), elegant volume control. Keep all functionality intact.

Redesign app/discover/page.tsx: Editorial-style discovery page with large hero section featuring a trending song, oversized artwork cards in horizontal scrolls, generous spacing between sections, cinematic feel for featured albums and popular artists sections.

Redesign app/artist/[id]/page.tsx: Magazine-style artist profile with large hero banner area (using artwork as background blur), oversized circular artist portrait, editorial biography section, statistics displayed elegantly, track listing with premium styling. The page should feel like a digital magazine profile.

Redesign app/album/[id]/page.tsx: Premium album detail page with large cinematic artwork (with background blur derived from artwork), elegant track listing table, refined metadata display, spacious layout.

Redesign app/track/[id]/page.tsx: Premium track detail page with oversized artwork, cinematic background blur, editorial details layout, elegant recommendations section. Use the Header component instead of custom header.
Redesign app/dashboard/page.tsx: Premium analytics dashboard with refined stat cards (larger, more spacious, with subtle borders), editorial insights section, elegant recently played list.
Redesign app/favorites/page.tsx: Premium favorites page with editorial heading, elegant empty state, use Header component for navigation consistency.
Redesign app/playlists/page.tsx: Premium playlists page with refined create form, elegant playlist cards with better expansion animation feel.
Redesign app/not-found.tsx: Premium 404 page with large editorial typography, elegant messaging.
Redesign app/error.tsx and app/loading.tsx: Premium error and loading states with refined animations and elegant design.

Redesign all loading.tsx files (app/dashboard/loading.tsx, app/discover/loading.tsx, app/playlists/loading.tsx, app/artist/[id]/loading.tsx, app/album/[id]/loading.tsx, app/track/[id]/loading.tsx): Premium skeleton loading with subtle pulse animations.
Redesign app/components/EmptyState.tsx: Elegant empty state with refined typography and artistic icon.
Redesign app/components/Skeleton.tsx and app/components/LoadingSpinner.tsx: Premium loading indicators with smooth animations.
Run npm run lint and npm run build to confirm zero errors.
acceptance_criteria: All pages have spacious editorial layouts with generous whitespace
Hero sections use large typography and cinematic artwork presentation
Artist page feels like a digital magazine profile with hero banner, circular portrait, biography, stats, and discography
Album page has cinematic artwork with background blur effects
Track page has oversized artwork and editorial detail layout
Search page has premium hero when empty and refined results when searching
All loading/error/empty states are elegantly designed
All pages are fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop
Consistent premium design language across all pages
findings: All pages redesigned with premium editorial layouts. Black-and-white palette maintained throughout (no saturated colors). Track page and Favorites page now use the Header component instead of custom markup, resolving unused import warnings. Discover page has a large hero section with the first trending song as featured content. Artist page is magazine-style with large circular portrait and hero blur background. All loading states use consistent premium skeleton with glass header. Pre-existing lint warnings in SearchFilters.tsx (GENRE_OPTIONS, YEAR_OPTIONS unused) remain. Build bun worker_threads warnings are cosmetic.
